A '''clone scout trooper''' served as part of a [[Faie's battle group|battle group]] under the leadership of [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Faie/Legends|Faie]] and utilized a [[BARC speeder/Legends|BARC speeder]] during the group's search for [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] as per [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]. The trooper was [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force pushed]] by Vos off his speeder. Vos then hijacked the speeder in his attempt to escape.<ref name="Republic 82" />

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 82|''Republic'' 82]] {{1st}}
